title: [JENKINS-45927] Truncate verbose CauseOfBlockage messages in queue
issue_text:
When multiple nodes reject a build task, CompositeCauseOfBlockage.getShortDescription() joins ALL rejection reasons with "; ", causing extremely verbose queue tooltips that can fill the entire browser window.

Fix: Modify CompositeCauseOfBlockage to show only the first 5 reasons, followed by "... and N more" when there are more than 5 reasons.

The class is at: core/src/main/java/jenkins/model/queue/CompositeCauseOfBlockage.java
The method to fix is: getShortDescription()
notes: Test file is new in this PR; injected into base worktree. Pure unit test, no JenkinsRule needed.
